classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of LlamaRotaryEmbedding; standard Llama RoPE

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeCausalConv1d
classes.rationale: nn.Conv1d subclass with left-pad streaming cache; uses standard 1D conv compute

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeRMSNorm
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of MistralRMSNorm; standard Llama-family RMSNorm

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeAttention
classes.rationale: Mistral-style attention with RoPE + paged KV; q/v/o have bias=True, k bias=False (Whisper-like asymmetric bias) — closest fit is L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention with bias kwarg, though kb-nano's QKVParallelLinear uses uniform bias

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeMLP
classes.rationale: Mistral SwiGLU MLP (silu activation per config); inherits gate/up/down structure from MistralMLP, only overrides down_proj bias=True

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeEmbedder
classes.rationale: two CausalConv1d + GELU stack for mel-bin -> hidden audio feature embedding

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: layer_norm -> attention -> residual -> layer_norm -> mlp -> residual; composes

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeEncoder
classes.rationale: encoder stack: embedder + RMSNorm + N x EncoderLayer + RoPE; composes

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeTextAdaRmsNorm
classes.rationale: ada-layer-norm-style time conditioning: linear -> gelu -> linear; no exact kb-nano L2 file

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeTextAttention
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; standard Mistral attention -> LlamaAttention

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeTextMLP
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; standard Mistral SwiGLU MLP

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeTextDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: input_norm -> attn -> post_attn_norm + ada_rms_norm + mlp; composes

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeTextModel
classes.rationale: wiring container; composes

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeTextForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring with LM head; composes

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeTimeEmbedding
classes.rationale: sinusoidal timestep embedding; no kb-nano L2 file (custom inv_freq)

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: linear-projection wrapper between encoder and text model; composes

classes.name: VoxtralRealtimeForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: top-level encoder+projector+text model; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2NoLayerNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + GELU activation (feat_extract_activation default gelu); no fused kb-nano L2 audio-feature extractor

classes.name: Wav2Vec2LayerNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + transpose + LayerNorm + GELU; no fused kb-nano L2 file

classes.name: Wav2Vec2GroupNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + GroupNorm + GELU; no fused L2 file but L1 ops cover compute

classes.name: Wav2Vec2PositionalConvEmbedding
classes.rationale: Conv1d with weight_norm parametrization + same-pad + GELU; weight_norm is not provided as a kb-nano kernel

classes.name: Wav2Vec2SamePadLayer
classes.rationale: trivial slicing op; no kernel needed

classes.name: Wav2Vec2FeatureEncoder
classes.rationale: container of conv-norm-act layers; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2FeatureProjection
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear projection from conv_dim to hidden_size

classes.name: Wav2Vec2Attention
classes.rationale: BART/encoder-style MHA: separate q/k/v/out_proj (all bias=True), non-causal full attention; matches EncoderSelfAttention pattern (kb-nano fused QKV via Linear/varlen flash-attn)

classes.name: Wav2Vec2FeedForward
classes.rationale: fc1(intermediate_dense) + gelu + fc2(output_dense) with dropouts; no fused kb-nano L2 file matches (encoder_mlp.py uses split intermediate/output with LN, whisper_mlp uses bias=True parallel TP linear)

classes.name: Wav2Vec2EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: attn + LN + FFN + LN (post-norm); composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2EncoderLayerStableLayerNorm
classes.rationale: pre-norm variant of EncoderLayer; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2Encoder
classes.rationale: stack of layers; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2EncoderStableLayerNorm
classes.rationale: stack of stable-layer-norm layers; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2GumbelVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: Gumbel-softmax vector quantizer for self-supervised pretraining; no kb-nano coverage (training-only)

classes.name: Wav2Vec2Adapter
classes.rationale: adapter stack (proj + GLU + adapter layers); composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2AdapterLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + GLU adapter; not covered by any kb-nano L2

classes.name: Wav2Vec2AttnAdapterLayer
classes.rationale: bottleneck adapter: LN + Linear + ReLU + Linear (bottleneck size); decomposes to L1 ops

classes.name: Wav2Vec2Model
classes.rationale: top-level wiring; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ForPreTraining
classes.rationale: training-time head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ForCTC
classes.rationale: CTC head: Linear(hidden, vocab); composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: classification head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ForAudioFrameClassification
classes.rationale: classification head; composes

classes.name: AMSoftmaxLoss
classes.rationale: training loss; not inference compute

classes.name: TDNNLayer
classes.rationale: TDNN = Conv1d + ReLU; uses L1 conv1d

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ForXVector
classes.rationale: speaker-embedding head with TDNN stack; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertRotaryPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: custom rotary positional embedding for Conformer (different layout from Llama RoPE); no exact kb-nano kernel

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertRelPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Transformer-XL style relative position embedding; no kb-nano coverage

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertFeatureProjection
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear projection

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertFeedForward
classes.rationale: fc1 + swish (silu) + fc2; default hidden_act=swish; no exact kb-nano L2 file (whisper_mlp uses gelu, llama_mlp uses fused gate_up_proj)

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertConvolutionModule
classes.rationale: Conformer conv module: LN -> pointwise conv1 (2x dim) -> GLU -> depthwise conv -> LN -> swish -> pointwise conv2; no fused kb-nano L2 file for Conformer conv

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Conformer attention with optional rotary/relative/relative_key position embeddings (Transformer-XL relative bias scoring); no kb-nano kernel for Conformer-style relative-bias attention

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Macaron-Conformer block: ffn1 -> attn -> conv -> ffn2 -> final-LN; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of layers + position embeddings; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertAdapter
classes.rationale: downsampling adapter stack; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertAdapterLayer
classes.rationale: adapter conv + attn + ffn block; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertModel
classes.rationale: top-level wiring; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertForCTC
classes.rationale: CTC head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: classification head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertForAudioFrameClassification
classes.rationale: frame classification head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2BertForXVector
classes.rationale: speaker embedding head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerPositionalConvEmbedding
classes.rationale: weight_norm Conv1d + same-pad + activation; no kb-nano weight_norm support

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerRotaryPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: custom rotary positional embedding (different from Llama RoPE structure)

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerRelPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Transformer-XL style sinusoidal relative position embedding; no kb-nano coverage

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerFeatureEncoder
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; conv-stack feature extractor

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerFeatureProjection
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; LayerNorm + Linear

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerFeedForward
classes.rationale: trivial subclass: fc1 + gelu + fc2 (default hidden_act=gelu); no fused kb-nano L2 file

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerConvolutionModule
classes.rationale: Conformer conv module: LN -> pointwise conv (2x) -> GLU -> depthwise conv -> BatchNorm1d -> activation -> pointwise conv; uses BatchNorm1d (no kb-nano BN1d, only BN2d); no fused L2 file

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Conformer attention with rotary or Transformer-XL relative-position bias (rel_shift einsum scoring); no kb-nano kernel for relative-bias attention

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Macaron-Conformer block: ffn1 + attn + conv + ffn2; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of layers + positional embeddings; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerGumbelVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: training-only Gumbel quantizer; no kb-nano coverage

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerAdapter
classes.rationale: adapter stack; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerAdapterLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + GLU adapter; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerModel
classes.rationale: top-level wiring; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerForPreTraining
classes.rationale: training head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerForCTC
classes.rationale: CTC head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: classification head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerForAudioFrameClassification
classes.rationale: frame classification head; composes

classes.name: Wav2Vec2ConformerForXVector
classes.rationale: speaker embedding head; composes

classes.name: WavLMPositionalConvEmbedding
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; weight_norm Conv1d-based positional embedding

classes.name: WavLMFeatureProjection
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; LayerNorm + Linear

classes.name: WavLMAttention
classes.rationale: Custom attention with GRU-gated relative position bias (gru_rel_pos_linear, pos_bias_const + bucketed relative attention); calls F.multi_head_attention_forward; no kb-nano kernel for gated relative-bias attention

classes.name: WavLMFeedForward
classes.rationale: trivial subclass: fc1 + gelu + fc2 (default hidden_act=gelu); no fused L2 file

classes.name: WavLMEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: attn + ffn (post-norm); composes

classes.name: WavLMEncoderLayerStableLayerNorm
classes.rationale: wiring: attn + ffn (pre-norm); composes

classes.name: WavLMEncoder
classes.rationale: encoder stack; composes

classes.name: WavLMEncoderStableLayerNorm
classes.rationale: encoder stack (pre-norm); composes

classes.name: WavLMGumbelVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: Gumbel-softmax quantizer; training-only

classes.name: WavLMModel
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; top-level wiring; composes

classes.name: WavLMForCTC
classes.rationale: CTC head; composes

classes.name: WavLMForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: classification head; composes

classes.name: WavLMForAudioFrameClassification
classes.rationale: frame classification head; composes

classes.name: WavLMForXVector
classes.rationale: speaker embedding head; composes

classes.name: WhisperPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: learned positional embedding (extends nn.Embedding)

classes.name: WhisperAttention
classes.rationale: single class handles encoder self / decoder self / decoder cross modes; kb-nano splits into 3 specialized classes (WhisperEncoderSelfAttention, WhisperDecoderSelfAttention, WhisperCrossAttention) all in this file; bias=True on q/v/o, bias=False on k

classes.name: WhisperEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: pre-norm: LN -> attn -> residual -> LN -> fc1 -> gelu -> fc2 -> residual; matches L3/whisper_encoder_layer.py wiring; composes

classes.name: WhisperDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: pre-norm self-attn + cross-attn + ffn; matches L3/whisper_decoder_layer.py wiring; composes

classes.name: WhisperEncoder
classes.rationale: Conv1d feature extractor + sinusoidal pos embed + N layers + LN; composes

classes.name: WhisperDecoder
classes.rationale: token embedding + learned pos embed + N layers; composes

classes.name: WhisperModel
classes.rationale: encoder + decoder wiring; composes

classes.name: WhisperForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: top-level model; matches L4/whisper.py:WhisperForConditionalGeneration; composes

classes.name: WhisperDecoderWrapper
classes.rationale: wraps decoder for causal-LM use; composes

classes.name: WhisperForCausalLM
classes.rationale: decoder-only causal LM; composes

classes.name: WhisperForAudioClassification
classes.rationale: encoder + classification head; composes

classes.name: XCLIPVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; patch + position embeddings (Conv2d patch projection + nn.Parameter cls + Embedding pos)

classes.name: XCLIPTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; CLIPTextEmbeddings (token+position embedding) is in L2/clip_mlp.py

classes.name: XCLIPAttention
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; CLIP-style separate q/k/v/out projections, non-causal SDPA

classes.name: XCLIPMLP
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; fc1 + quick_gelu + fc2 (config default hidden_act=quick_gelu)

classes.name: XCLIPEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: LN -> attn -> residual -> LN -> mlp -> residual; composes

classes.name: XCLIPDropPath
classes.rationale: stochastic depth; training-only, identity at inference

classes.name: XCLIPVisionEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: vision-specific encoder layer with drop-path between attn/mlp blocks; composes

classes.name: XCLIPEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of XCLIPEncoderLayer; composes

classes.name: XCLIPVisionEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of XCLIPVisionEncoderLayer; composes

classes.name: XCLIPTextModel
classes.rationale: text tower wiring; composes

classes.name: XCLIPVisionModel
classes.rationale: vision tower wiring; composes

classes.name: XCLIPMultiframeIntegrationTransformer
classes.rationale: multi-frame integration tiny transformer with learned positional embedding; composes

classes.name: XCLIPCrossAttention
classes.rationale: cross-attention variant of CLIPAttention (overrides forward to take queries+keys+values separately); same kernels as CLIPAttention

classes.name: PromptGeneratorLayer
classes.rationale: cross-attn + ffn block for video prompt generation; composes via XCLIPCrossAttention

classes.name: XCLIPPromptGenerator
classes.rationale: stack of PromptGeneratorLayer; composes

classes.name: XCLIPModel
classes.rationale: top-level dual-tower + MIT + prompt generator; composes

classes.name: XcodecResidualUnit
classes.rationale: ELU + Conv1d + ELU + Conv1d residual; uses L1 conv1d/elu

classes.name: XcodecSemanticEncoderBlock
classes.rationale: stack of residual units + downsample Conv1d; composes

classes.name: SemanticEncoder
classes.rationale: Conv1d + N XcodecSemanticEncoderBlocks; composes

classes.name: SemanticDecoderBlock
classes.rationale: ConvTranspose1d (or Conv1d if stride=1) + residual units; uses L1 conv kernels

classes.name: SemanticDecoder
classes.rationale: Conv1d + N SemanticDecoderBlocks + Conv1d; composes

classes.name: XcodecEuclideanCodebook
classes.rationale: Euclidean-distance codebook with embed buffer; quantize via matmul + argmax + F.embedding lookup; no kb-nano kernel for VQ codebook

classes.name: XcodecVectorQuantization
classes.rationale: wraps XcodecEuclideanCodebook with permute; composes

classes.name: XcodecResidualVectorQuantization
classes.rationale: RVQ stack: encode/decode loop over quantizers; composes

classes.name: XcodecModel
classes.rationale: top-level codec: acoustic encoder/decoder (loaded via AutoModel - typically DAC) + semantic encoder/decoder (HuBERT/Wav2Vec2 backbone) + RVQ; composes

classes.name: XGLMScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: Embedding with optional scale factor multiplication

classes.name: XGLMSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: fixed sinusoidal positional embedding

classes.name: XGLMAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-style MHA: separate q/k/v/out_proj all bias=True, no RoPE, supports self/cross/encoder-decoder modes via key_value_states; closest match is WhisperAttention's three variants in whisper_attention.py

classes.name: XGLMDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: pre-norm: LN -> self-attn -> residual -> [LN -> cross-attn -> residual] -> LN -> fc1 -> gelu -> fc2 -> residual; composes

classes.name: XGLMModel
classes.rationale: scaled embedding + sinusoidal pos + N decoder layers + LN; composes

classes.name: XGLMForCausalLM
classes.rationale: decoder + LM head; composes

classes.name: XLMPoolerStartLogits
classes.rationale: QA pooler head; composes

classes.name: XLMPoolerEndLogits
classes.rationale: QA pooler head; composes

classes.name: XLMPoolerAnswerClass
classes.rationale: QA pooler head; composes

classes.name: XLMSQuADHead
classes.rationale: QA head wiring; composes

classes.name: XLMSequenceSummary
classes.rationale: sequence summary head with optional Linear+Tanh; composes

classes.name: MultiHeadAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-encoder-style MHA: separate q_lin/k_lin/v_lin/out_lin (no causal), optional cross-attention via kv= argument; matches EncoderSelfAttention pattern

classes.name: TransformerFFN
classes.rationale: lin1 + gelu (config.gelu_activation=True default) + lin2 + dropout; uses chunked-forward for memory; no L2 file matches exactly

classes.name: XLMModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + layer_norm_emb + N x (attn + ffn + LN) layers; composes

classes.name: XLMPredLayer
classes.rationale: LM head with adaptive softmax option; composes

classes.name: XLMWithLMHeadModel
classes.rationale: model + LM head; composes

classes.name: XLMForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: model + classification head; composes

classes.name: XLMForQuestionAnsweringSimple
classes.rationale: QA head; composes

classes.name: XLMForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: QA head; composes

classes.name: XLMForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: token classification head; composes

classes.name: XLMForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: multiple choice head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style: word + position (with padding-idx-based offset) + token-type + LN; matches L2/xlm_roberta_embeddings.py:XLMRobertaEmbeddings (extends EncoderEmbeddingsBase)

classes.name: XLMRobertaSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention: separate query/key/value Linear layers, non-causal by default; matches EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: XLMRobertaCrossAttention
classes.rationale: cross-attention with separate q/k/v + EncoderDecoderCache support; no kb-nano L2 cross-attention file for encoder models (only whisper-style cross-attn exists); decomposes from L1 ops

classes.name: XLMRobertaSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Add + LayerNorm post-attention output; matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: XLMRobertaAttention
classes.rationale: wiring around (Self|Cross)Attention + SelfOutput; matches EncoderAttention pattern; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + gelu (default hidden_act=gelu); matches EncoderIntermediate

classes.name: XLMRobertaOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Add + LayerNorm; matches EncoderOutput

classes.name: XLMRobertaLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: attention + intermediate + output; matches L3/xlm_roberta_layer.py (composes)

classes.name: XLMRobertaLMHead
classes.rationale: Linear + gelu + LN + decoder Linear (tied weights with embedding); composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of XLMRobertaLayer; matches L3/xlm_roberta_encoder.py; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + tanh on first token; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder + pooler; matches L3/xlm_roberta_model.py; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaForCausalLM
classes.rationale: model + LM head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: model + masked LM head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaClassificationHead
classes.rationale: dense + tanh + dropout + out_proj; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: model + classification head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: model + classification head for multiple choice; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: model + token classification head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: model + QA head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLEmbeddings
classes.rationale: deletes LayerNorm from RobertaEmbeddings (XL applies pre-norm before each layer); same word/pos/type embedding compute

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLSelfAttention
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of BertSelfAttention; matches EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLCrossAttention
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of BertCrossAttention; no kb-nano L2 cross-attention file for encoder models

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLSelfOutput
classes.rationale: dense + dropout + residual (no LayerNorm in XL post-output; LN is moved to pre-attention)

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLAttention
classes.rationale: pre-norm wrapper: self_attn_layer_norm + Self/CrossAttention + SelfOutput; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLOutput
classes.rationale: dense + residual (no LN; LN before FFN)

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLLayer
classes.rationale: pre-norm: LN + intermediate + output (LN moved before FFN); composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of XL layers; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLModel
classes.rationale: trivial subclass; embeddings + encoder + pooler; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLLMHead
classes.rationale: dense + gelu + LN + decoder; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLClassificationHead
classes.rationale: dense + tanh + dropout + out_proj; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLForCausalLM
classes.rationale: model + LM head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: model + MLM head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: model + classification head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: model + multiple choice head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: model + token classification head; composes

classes.name: XLMRobertaXLForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: model + QA head; composes

classes.name: XLNetRelativeAttention
classes.rationale: Two-stream relative attention with content/query streams, segment embeddings, Transformer-XL relative position scoring (rel_shift, r_w_bias, r_r_bias, r_s_bias); custom einsum-based implementation; no kb-nano kernel for two-stream relative attention

classes.name: XLNetFeedForward
classes.rationale: layer_1 + gelu + dropout + layer_2 + dropout + residual + LN (post-norm); ff_activation default 'gelu'

classes.name: XLNetLayer
classes.rationale: rel_attn + ffn (two-stream); composes

classes.name: XLNetPoolerStartLogits
classes.rationale: QA pooler head; composes

classes.name: XLNetPoolerEndLogits
classes.rationale: QA pooler head; composes

classes.name: XLNetPoolerAnswerClass
classes.rationale: QA pooler head; composes

classes.name: XLNetSequenceSummary
classes.rationale: sequence summary head; composes

classes.name: XLNetModel
classes.rationale: two-stream wiring with permutation masking; composes

classes.name: XLNetLMHeadModel
classes.rationale: model + LM head; composes

classes.name: XLNetForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: model + classification head; composes

classes.name: XLNetForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: model + token classification; composes

classes.name: XLNetForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: model + multiple choice head; composes

classes.name: XLNetForQuestionAnsweringSimple
classes.rationale: model + QA head; composes

classes.name: XLNetForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: model + QA head; composes

classes.name: xLSTMPreTrainedModel
classes.rationale: abstract base; composes

classes.name: xLSTMModel
classes.rationale: stack of xLSTMBlocks (gated mLSTM cells with custom CUDA kernel from external mlstm_kernels package); kb-nano has no mLSTM coverage (per task brief)

classes.name: xLSTMForCausalLM
classes.rationale: model + LM head; composes; underlying mLSTM kernels not covered

classes.name: XmodEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style word + position (padding-idx-based) + token-type + LN embeddings; matches L2/xlm_roberta_embeddings.py pattern

classes.name: XmodSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style separate q/k/v Linear; matches EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: XmodCrossAttention
classes.rationale: cross-attn with separate q/k/v + EncoderDecoderCache; no kb-nano L2 file for encoder cross-attention

classes.name: XmodSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + residual + LN; matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: XmodAttention
classes.rationale: wraps SelfAttention + SelfOutput with optional pre_norm flag; composes

classes.name: XmodIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + gelu (default hidden_act=gelu); matches EncoderIntermediate

classes.name: XmodAdapter
classes.rationale: language adapter: dense1 + activation + dense2 bottleneck; one adapter per language

classes.name: XmodOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + residual + LN + per-language adapter routing (lang_adapter); custom adapter dispatch logic; partial via L2/encoder_mlp.py for the dense+LN part

classes.name: XmodLayer
classes.rationale: BERT-layer with adapter outputs; composes

classes.name: XmodEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of XmodLayer; composes

classes.name: XmodPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + tanh on first token; composes

classes.name: XmodModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder + pooler; composes

classes.name: XmodForCausalLM
classes.rationale: model + LM head; composes

classes.name: XmodForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: model + MLM head; composes

classes.name: XmodLMHead
classes.rationale: dense + gelu + LN + decoder; composes

classes.name: XmodForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: model + classification head; composes

classes.name: XmodForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: model + multiple choice head; composes

classes.name: XmodForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: model + token classification; composes

classes.name: XmodClassificationHead
classes.rationale: dense + tanh + dropout + out_proj; composes

classes.name: XmodForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: model + QA head; composes

classes.name: YolosEmbeddings
classes.rationale: patch embeddings + cls token + detection tokens + interpolated learned position embeddings; no fused L2 file (vision_patch_embed.py is for plain ViT, doesn't have detection tokens)

classes.name: InterpolateInitialPositionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: bicubic interpolation of position embeddings to match new image size

classes.name: InterpolateMidPositionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: bicubic interpolation of mid-layer position embeddings

classes.name: YolosPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d projection of pixel patches to hidden_size + flatten/transpose

classes.name: YolosSelfAttention
classes.rationale: ViT self-attention copied from ViTSelfAttention: separate query/key/value Linear (config.qkv_bias), non-causal SDPA; matches EncoderSelfAttention pattern

classes.name: YolosSelfOutput
classes.rationale: dense + dropout (no LN; LN is moved to YolosLayer pre-norm); ViT pattern

classes.name: YolosAttention
classes.rationale: wraps YolosSelfAttention + YolosSelfOutput; composes

classes.name: YolosIntermediate
classes.rationale: dense + gelu (default hidden_act=gelu); ViT pattern (no LN baked in)

classes.name: YolosOutput
classes.rationale: dense + dropout + residual (ViT pattern, no LN baked in)

classes.name: YolosLayer
classes.rationale: ViT pre-norm: layernorm_before + attn + residual + layernorm_after + intermediate + output + residual; composes

classes.name: YolosEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of YolosLayers + interpolated mid-position embeddings; composes

classes.name: YolosModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder + LN + optional pooler; composes

classes.name: YolosPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + tanh on first token; composes

classes.name: YolosMLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: MLP head with N hidden layers + ReLU for bbox prediction; composes

classes.name: YolosForObjectDetection
classes.rationale: model + class/bbox heads + DETR-style Hungarian loss; composes

classes.name: YosoCumulation
classes.rationale: custom autograd Function for soft-LSH cumulation; not a kernel module

classes.name: YosoLSHCumulation
classes.rationale: custom autograd Function for hard-LSH cumulation (uses fast_lsh_cumulation custom CUDA kernel); not a kernel module

classes.name: YosoEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token-type + LN; partial via L1 embedding/layer_norm (no fused L2 for YOSO)

classes.name: YosoSelfAttention
classes.rationale: YOSO LSH-based linear attention with soft/hard hashing variants (use_expectation flag), uses custom CUDA kernel fast_lsh_cumulation; no kb-nano coverage for LSH attention

classes.name: YosoSelfOutput
classes.rationale: dense + dropout + residual + LN (post-norm); matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: YosoAttention
classes.rationale: wraps SelfAttention + SelfOutput; composes

classes.name: YosoIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + gelu (default hidden_act=gelu); matches EncoderIntermediate

classes.name: YosoOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + residual + LN; matches EncoderOutput

classes.name: YosoLayer
classes.rationale: BERT-layer wiring: attn + intermediate + output; composes

classes.name: YosoEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of YosoLayers; composes

classes.name: YosoPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + LN; composes

classes.name: YosoLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: transform + decoder Linear with bias; composes

classes.name: YosoOnlyMLMHead
classes.rationale: MLM head wrapper; composes

classes.name: YosoModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder; composes

classes.name: YosoForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: model + MLM head; composes

classes.name: YosoClassificationHead
classes.rationale: dense + tanh + out_proj; composes

classes.name: YosoForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: model + classification head; composes

classes.name: YosoForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: model + multiple choice head; composes

classes.name: YosoForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: model + token classification; composes

classes.name: YosoForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: model + QA head; composes

classes.name: YoutuRMSNorm
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of LlamaRMSNorm; standard Llama-family RMSNorm

classes.name: YoutuRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of LlamaRotaryEmbedding but config uses YaRN-style rope_parameters (mscale, factor) consistent with DeepSeek-V3; YaRN-DeepSeek RoPE is in yarn_rotary_emb.py

classes.name: YoutuMLP
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of Qwen3MLP; SwiGLU MLP (silu activation per config); LlamaMLP unifies Llama/Qwen variants

classes.name: YoutuAttention
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of DeepseekV3Attention; MLA (q_lora/kv_lora compression with rope_head_dim split + nope/rope concat) matches L2/deepseek_mla_attention.py:DeepSeekMLAAttention

classes.name: YoutuDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: input_norm -> self_attn -> post_attn_norm -> mlp wiring (trivial Llama subclass); composes

classes.name: YoutuModel
classes.rationale: trivial Llama-style model wiring; composes

classes.name: YoutuForCausalLM
classes.rationale: trivial Llama-style causal LM with LM head; composes

classes.name: ZambaRMSNorm
classes.rationale: standard Llama-family RMSNorm (rsqrt of mean-square + scale); 'equivalent to T5LayerNorm' per docstring but identical to standard RMSNorm (no centering, weight applied)

classes.name: ZambaAttention
classes.rationale: Mistral-style attention without RoPE, with GQA and sliding window; input dimension is 2*hidden_size due to concat with original embeddings (Zamba paper); JambaAttention matches the no-RoPE + paged-KV pattern

classes.name: ZambaMambaMixer
classes.rationale: multi-headed Mamba1 selective-scan with x_proj/dt_proj per-head + causal conv1d; closest fit is JambaMambaMixer (Mamba1 with optional dt/B/C layernorms via causal_conv1d/selective_scan kernels); Zamba uses multi-head adaptation

classes.name: ZambaMLP
classes.rationale: GeGLU pattern: down(act(gate(x)) * up(x)) with hidden_act=gelu by default; structurally same as LlamaMLP but with GELU instead of SiLU; no fused kb-nano L2 file (llama_mlp uses silu_and_mul)

classes.name: ZambaAttentionDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: concat(hidden, original) + input_norm + attn + pre_ff_norm + ffn (no residual after the layer; residual is applied by HybridLayer); composes

classes.name: ZambaMambaDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: input_norm + mamba mixer + residual; composes

classes.name: ZambaHybridLayer
classes.rationale: shared transformer + linear projection + mamba decoder layer; composes

classes.name: ZambaModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + N x HybridLayer/MambaLayer + final RMSNorm; composes

classes.name: ZambaForCausalLM
classes.rationale: model + LM head; composes

classes.name: ZambaForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: model + classification head; composes

classes.name: Zamba2RMSNormGated
classes.rationale: RMSNorm with optional gating by silu(gate); group-wise normalization (group_size); matches kb-nano L1 rms_norm_gated for Mamba2 output norm

classes.name: Zamba2RMSNorm
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of ZambaRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: Zamba2RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: trivial subclass of LlamaRotaryEmbedding; used only when config.use_mem_rope=True

classes.name: Zamba2Attention
classes.rationale: extends ZambaAttention with optional RoPE (use_mem_rope) and per-block LoRA-style adapters on q/k/v projections (use_shared_attention_adapter); base attention pattern is jamba_attention.py (no-RoPE paged-KV variant); LoRA adapters not covered by base file

classes.name: Zamba2MambaMixer
classes.rationale: Mamba2 (SSD) mixer with chunk_scan + RMSNormGated + causal_conv1d; matches Mamba2Mixer compute pattern in mamba2_mixer.py

classes.name: Zamba2MLP
classes.rationale: GeGLU pattern with fused gate_up_proj + LoRA adapter (gate_up_proj_adapter_list) + down_proj; default hidden_act=gelu; LlamaMLP-like structure but with gelu_and_mul instead of silu_and_mul, plus per-block LoRA adapters

classes.name: Zamba2AttentionDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: uses Zamba2Attention + Zamba2MLP; same wiring as ZambaAttentionDecoderLayer; composes

classes.name: Zamba2MambaDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: uses Zamba2MambaMixer; composes

classes.name: Zamba2HybridLayer
classes.rationale: shared transformer + linear + Mamba2 layer; composes

classes.name: Zamba2Model
classes.rationale: embeddings + N x HybridLayer/Mamba2Layer + final norm; composes

classes.name: Zamba2ForCausalLM
classes.rationale: model + LM head; composes

classes.name: Zamba2ForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: model + classification head; composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthReassembleStage
classes.rationale: DPT-style reassemble stage: project Conv2d + resample ConvTranspose2d/Conv2d for each backbone feature; no kb-nano L2 file

classes.name: ZoeDepthReassembleLayer
classes.rationale: single Conv2d projection + optional ConvTranspose2d/Conv2d resample

classes.name: ZoeDepthFeatureFusionStage
classes.rationale: stack of feature fusion layers; composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthPreActResidualLayer
classes.rationale: pre-act residual: ReLU + Conv2d + ReLU + Conv2d

classes.name: ZoeDepthFeatureFusionLayer
classes.rationale: residual layers + Conv2d + interpolate; composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthNeck
classes.rationale: reassemble + fusion neck; composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthRelativeDepthEstimationHead
classes.rationale: Conv2d head for relative depth; composes

classes.name: LogBinomialSoftmax
classes.rationale: log-binomial probability head with k_idx buffer; custom head

classes.name: ZoeDepthConditionalLogBinomialSoftmax
classes.rationale: conditional variant of log-binomial; custom head

classes.name: ZoeDepthSeedBinRegressor
classes.rationale: Conv2d-based bin regressor; composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthAttractorLayer
classes.rationale: metric-depth attractor (Conv2d-based); composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthAttractorLayerUnnormed
classes.rationale: unnormed attractor variant; composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthProjector
classes.rationale: Conv2d + ReLU + Conv2d projector

classes.name: ZoeDepthMultiheadAttention
classes.rationale: manual MHA with separate Q/K/V Linear + softmax over scaled scores; matches EncoderSelfAttention (forward takes separate queries/keys/values like cross-attn)

classes.name: ZoeDepthTransformerEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: MHA + linear1 + relu + linear2 + dropouts + LN (post-norm); composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthPatchTransformerEncoder
classes.rationale: tiny patch-transformer with positional encoding + N encoder layers; composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthMLPClassifier
classes.rationale: Linear + ReLU + Linear MLP head

classes.name: ZoeDepthMultipleMetricDepthEstimationHeads
classes.rationale: metric depth head with patch transformer + multiple bin estimators; composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthMetricDepthEstimationHead
classes.rationale: single-domain metric depth head; composes

classes.name: ZoeDepthForDepthEstimation
classes.rationale: backbone (DPT/BEiT) + neck + relative head + metric head; composes
